description: Add adapter regression coverage asserting passthrough format_input omits output-marker response-instruction ceremony while structured dialects still include it. Protect R10 no-protocol contract.

notes.author: darin@darins-Mac-Studio-2.local
notes.content: Observed on unified merge verification (2026-02-25): cargo test --all-features fails test_chat_prompt_composition::passthrough_user_message_has_no_marker_or_output_protocol_ceremony at crates/dspy-rs/tests/test_chat_prompt_composition.rs:199 because passthrough user message still contains marker protocol ([[ ##)).

title: GAP follow-up: add test that Passthrough user prompts contain no output-marker protocol
